packageRules.description: piscina is a transitive dev-only dep (via @nestjs/cli > @swc/cli, which expects 4.x). The pnpm override is a security floor (>=4.9.3 clears GHSA-x9g3-xrwr-cwfg); forcing 5.x only reintroduces an @swc/cli peer mismatch with no benefit. Pin to 4.x.

Block TypeScript major bumps. TS7 ships the native (Go) compiler, whose JS API shim lacks getParsedCommandLineOfConfigFile — nest/tsc-based build toolchains crash on it. Re-enable deliberately once the toolchain supports TS7.
